title: noglow
description: disable the rendering of the glowing effect, primarily targeted at computers that may have issues rendering it
body:
# noglow

![me with no glow](https://i.imgur.com/RUvlDWb.png)

all it does is disable the rendering of glowing, nothing else.
can help in situations like:
- multiplayer servers where they excessively abuse the glowing effect
- people with a graphics card that may be challenged with basic shaders (integrated graphics are the biggest culprit here!)
- general annoyance prevention
